8c6301aa4d58.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
8c6301aa4d58.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
8c6301aa4d58.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

8c4638bad1bc.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
8c4638bad1bc.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
8c4638bad1bc.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

5611e7b3f7ba.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
5611e7b3f7ba.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

60d6ffb24c4c.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
60d6ffb24c4c.description: At 98 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
